saas.label: SaaS
saas.seoTitle: SaaS Logo Generator — B2B Software Marks That Convert | SNAPBRAND
saas.seoDescription: Launch a credible B2B brand: AI SaaS logos for signup flows, pricing pages, and product UI. Win trials and demos—start free, upgrade for vectors and commercial use.
saas.description: Position your product as enterprise-ready before the first sales call—your logo belongs on the homepage, changelog, and investor deck.

benefits.title: Funnel Credibility
benefits.desc: Visitors judge trust in seconds. A sharp mark signals a serious product—not a side project.

benefits.title: PLG-Ready
benefits.desc: Cohesive visuals across marketing site, app shell, and docs so the brand feels intentional end to end.

benefits.title: Deck & Board-Ready
benefits.desc: Present a unified story for fundraising and hiring; iterate fast when positioning shifts.

benefits.title: Ship This Sprint
benefits.desc: No agency queue—generate directions in minutes and pick what fits your category.

faqItems.q: Will it read enterprise vs. playful?
faqItems.a: Describe your ICP and tone. We bias toward trustworthy, modern B2B unless you ask for bold consumer energy.

faqItems.q: Can I use it in-product and in ads?
faqItems.a: Free is for trying personally. Pro unlocks commercial use across site, ads, and product surfaces—see plan terms.
Mention light vs. dark UI in your brief for better contrast. Pro adds formats suited to icons and favicons.

faqItems.q: What if we rebrand after a pivot?
faqItems.a: Regenerate anytime; Pro supports unlimited exploration as messaging evolves.
Typically under a minute from submit to downloadable assets.

saas.ctaSectionBlurb: Put a confident mark on your site, deck, and product chrome—three free generations, then scale with Pro.

benefits.title: Thought Leadership

benefits.title: Practice-Area Fit
benefits.desc: Strategy, ops, HR, IT—describe your niche; we avoid gimmicky stock tropes.

faqItems.a: Say which you are—we tune scale and formality (named partners vs. personal brand).
Set the tone: modern, warm, precise—we balance authority and approachability.
Free: PNG for quick use. Pro: vectors for print, slide masters, signatures.
Share palette and type hints plus brands to avoid—we keep the mark coherent.
Pro includes commercial use for client-facing work—verify scope in your plan.

consulting.ctaSectionBlurb: Drop a polished mark into proposals and profiles today—three free tries before you upgrade.

faqItems.a: Both—tell us buyer, category, and tone so visuals match your GTM motion.
